title: SearchResourcesRequest
description: Request to search the resources in the specified FHIR store.

resourceType.description: Required. The FHIR resource type to search, such as Patient or Observation. For a complete list, see the FHIR Resource Index ([DSTU2](http://hl7.org/implement/standards/fhir/DSTU2/resourcelist.html), [STU3](http://hl7.org/implement/standards/fhir/STU3/resourcelist.html), [R4](http://hl7.org/implement/standards/fhir/R4/resourcelist.html)).
